376.title: Celebrity Damage Control
376.description: When numerous women allege sexual harrassment against Schwarzenegger, his sterling reputation takes a hit, putting the Hollywood hero in need of some tough-as-nails damage control.

414.title: Celebrity Damage Control
414.description: Nick Nolte's lifelong fondness for drugs and alcohol grew into a serious addiction, leading to a DUI arrest and a knock to his reputation and career.

7137.title: Celebrity Damage Control
7137.description: Tom Cruise's all-American persona takes a massive hit after the public learns of his love for Scientology, leaving fans to wonder if he's really the man they thought he was.
